# terrible_community_general_scaleway_volume (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `name` (String) Name used to identify the volume.
- `region` (String) Scaleway region to use (for example par1).

### Optional

- `organization` (String) ScaleWay organization ID to which volume belongs.
- `project` (String) Scaleway project ID to which volume belongs.
- `size` (Number) Size of the volume in bytes.
- `state` (String) Indicate desired state of the volume.
- `volume_type` (String) Type of the volume (for example 'l_ssd').

### Read-Only

- `data` (String) This is only present when `state=present`.
